underlying_goal: Analyze real-time interpretation pipeline latency using Honeycomb, identify causes of latency spikes, and implement optimizations (cap conversation history to 5 turns), then ship the change via PR
friction_detail: schema.rb noise from stale main state caused extended back-and-forth trying to get a clean diff, requiring DB drops/restores and ultimately removing the migration from the PR.
brief_summary: User wanted to analyze interpretation pipeline latency in Honeycomb and optimize it; Claude provided thorough analysis, implemented a 5-turn history cap, and shipped a PR, though schema.rb drift caused significant friction during the shipping process.
